transformation: Add only irrelevant policy material to a request with no reachable allow/deny
minimization_criterion: Smallest policy retaining no reachable matching rule

transformation: Add a matching deny to a request with a matching allow
invalid_transformation_rejection: Reject non-matching or weaker deny additions

transformation: Replace principal with one whose role closure is a superset
minimization_criterion: Role assignments needed for subset/superset witness

transformation: Move a denied request through a stricter role relation
invalid_transformation_rejection: Reject substitutions that lose the deny role

minimization_criterion: Only reachable slice plus added unreachable atom

transformation: Add an edge already implied by transitive closure
invalid_transformation_rejection: Reject hierarchy changes not implied by closure

transformation: Introduce child role and rewrite assignment consistently
minimization_criterion: Old role, new child, inherited rule

transformation: Remove an allow shadowed by matching deny
Reverse rules in an unordered fragment
minimization_criterion: Same multiset of rules in two orders

transformation: Rename identifiers outside the request-reachable slice
minimization_criterion: Identifier map plus unaffected request slice

transformation: Split a permission scope while preserving target assignment
